title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Wano Citizens, Unknown person #9, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's easy to search a bath house...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: It's the beasts pirates headliner, Hawkins!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DRAKE, ONE OF THE FLYING SIX, IS ALSO OUTSIDE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are they here at the bath house...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What are you doing, Drake? Come inside.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm here to take care of that O-soba mask idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HANDLE THE OTHER SMALL FRY ON YOUR OWN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should we do, shinobu!? They have to be here for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Coming to such a defenseless place... how underhanded of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...!! No way, how does he know about that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LINE UP IN A SINGLE-FILE LINE!! MAKE SURE WE CAN SEE YOUR FEET!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: arrest anyone with a waning cres- cent moon on their ankle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THOSE OF YOU IN THE BATHTUBS, GET OUT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami! I'll back you up if anything happens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got it all wrong! I wasn't trying to hide!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh good. Ness. That's a real national treasure right there.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the end for me!! I'm at my limit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What!? That's the guy from yesterday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just like a large, overflowing river...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what's up with that costume?! Are you being serious!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did they just say O-SOBA Mask!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
